summary: The user is exploring graphic novels similar to "Saga" by Brian K. Vaughan and Fiona Staples and has recently started reading "The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo" by Taylor Jenkins Reid. They express interest in contemporary fiction featuring strong female protagonists and discuss themes of identity and female relationships in "Evelyn Hugo."
